	 <path
	   fill="#ffd966"
	   fill-opacity="0"
	   d="m 40.486633,42.90833 c 0,-5.331612 4.322128,-9.653736 9.65374,-9.653736 H 302.64391 c 2.56034,0 5.01581,1.017086 6.82624,2.827515 1.81042,1.810424 2.82751,4.265892 2.82751,6.826221 v 38.61379 c 0,5.331612 -4.32214,9.653732 -9.65375,9.653732 H 50.140373 c -5.331612,0 -9.65374,-4.322121 -9.65374,-9.653732 z"
	   fill-rule="evenodd"
	   id="click_yellow" />
	 <path
	   fill="#eeeeee"
	   fill-opacity="0"
	   d="m 40.486633,113.29678 c 0,-5.33161 4.322128,-9.65374 9.65374,-9.65374 H 302.64391 c 2.56034,0 5.01581,1.01709 6.82624,2.82751 1.81042,1.81043 2.82751,4.2659 2.82751,6.82623 v 38.61378 c 0,5.33161 -4.32214,9.65374 -9.65375,9.65374 H 50.140373 c -5.331612,0 -9.65374,-4.32213 -9.65374,-9.65374 z"

	 <path
	   fill="#b4a7d6"

	   d="m 40.486633,184.52515 c 0,-5.79549 4.69817,-10.49365 10.493649,-10.49365 H 301.80401 c 2.78308,0 5.45218,1.10557 7.42014,3.07351 1.96792,1.96795 3.07351,4.63704 3.07351,7.42014 v 41.97333 c 0,5.79548 -4.69818,10.49365 -10.49365,10.49365 H 50.980282 c -5.795479,0 -10.493649,-4.69817 -10.493649,-10.49365 z"

	   fill-opacity="0"
	   d="m 40.486633,275.1208 c 0,-14.14197 11.464333,-25.60629 25.6063,-25.60629 H 255.54175 c 6.79123,0 13.30429,2.6978 18.10639,7.49991 4.80212,4.80212 7.49991,11.31518 7.49991,18.10638 v 0 c 0,14.14197 -11.46433,25.60629 -25.6063,25.60629 H 66.092932 c -14.141968,0 -25.6063,-11.46432 -25.606299,-25.60629 z"

	   fill="#93c47d"

	   d="m 40.486626,337.28497 c 0,-12.91565 10.470192,-23.38583 23.385826,-23.38583 H 199.49451 c 6.2023,0 12.15058,2.46386 16.53627,6.84954 4.3857,4.38569 6.84955,10.33399 6.84955,16.53629 v 0 c 0,12.91562 -10.47018,23.38583 -23.38582,23.38583 H 63.872452 c -12.915634,0 -23.385826,-10.47021 -23.385826,-23.38583 z"
	   fill-rule="evenodd"

	 <path
	   fill="#ff9900"
	   fill-opacity="0"
	   d="m 42.17839,394.42783 c 0,-12.35031 10.011898,-22.36221 22.362206,-22.36221 h 5.763779 c 5.930824,0 11.618736,2.35601 15.812469,6.54974 4.193726,4.19373 6.549736,9.88165 6.549736,15.81247 v 0 c 0,12.35031 -10.011902,22.36221 -22.362206,22.36221 h -5.763779 c -12.350307,0 -22.362206,-10.0119 -22.362205,-22.36221 z"
	   fill-rule="evenodd"
   	   id="click_orange" />
  </g>
</svg>

<script>
	const gray_box   = document.getElementById("click_gray");
	const purple_box = document.getElementById("click_purple");
	const yellow_box = document.getElementById("click_yellow");
	const orange_box = document.getElementById("click_orange");
	const blue_box   = document.getElementById("click_blue");
	const green_box  = document.getElementById("click_green");

	let current_gray   = 1;
	let current_purple = 1;
	let current_yellow = 1;
	let current_orange = 1;
	let current_blue   = 1;
	let current_green  = 1;

	gray   = [gray_box,   current_gray,   "gray_boxes", "gray_arrows"]
	purple = [purple_box, current_purple, "purple_boxes", "purple_arrows"]
	yellow = [yellow_box, current_yellow, "yellow_boxes", "yellow_arrows"]

	orange = [orange_box, current_orange, "orange_boxes"]
	blue   = [blue_box,   current_blue,   "blue_boxes"]
	green  = [green_box,  current_green,  "green_boxes"]

	gpy  = [gray, purple, yellow]
	rest = [blue, green, orange]

    gpy.forEach(item => {
    	box_arrow(item[0], item[1], item[2], item[3]);
    });

    rest.forEach(item => {
    	box(item[0], item[1], item[2]);
    });

	function box_arrow(element, state, name1, name2) {
		element.addEventListener('click', function() {
			if (state == 1) {
				document.getElementById(name1).setAttribute("style", "display:none;");
			    document.getElementById(name2).setAttribute("style", "display:none;");
			    state = 0;
			    check_purple_grey(name1);
			} else {
			    document.getElementById(name1).setAttribute("style", "display:visible;");
				document.getElementById(name2).setAttribute("style", "display:visible;");
			    state = 1;
			    check_purple_grey(name2);
			}
	})};

	function box(element, state, name) {
		element.addEventListener('click', function() {
			if (state == 1) {
				const target1 = document.getElementById(name)
				target1.setAttribute("style", "display:none;");
				state = 0;
			} else {
				const target1 = document.getElementById(name)
				target1.setAttribute("style", "display:visible;");
				state = 1;
			}
		})
	}

	function check_purple_grey(name) {
			if (name == "yellow_boxes") {
		    	pass
			} else {
				if ( name == "gray_boxes" || name == "purple_boxes" ) {
					document.getElementById("grey_purple_arrows").setAttribute("style", "display:none;");
				} else {
					test1 = document.getElementById("purple_boxes").getAttribute("style");
					test2 = document.getElementById("gray_boxes").getAttribute("style");
					console.log(test1);
					if (test1 == "display:visible;" && test2 == "display:visible;") {
						console.log("both are on")
						document.getElementById("grey_purple_arrows").setAttribute("style", "display:visible;");
					}
				}
			};
	}

</script>

</body>
</html>
